sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ngram_simhash (text String, hash_value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY hash_value;
INSERT INTO test_ngram_simhash (text, hash_value) VALUES ('ClickHouse', ngramSimHashUTF8('ClickHouse'));
UPDATE test_ngram_simhash SET hash_value = ngramSimHashUTF8(text) WHERE text = 'ClickHouse';
SELECT text, hash_value FROM test_ngram_simhash WHERE hash_value = ngramSimHashUTF8('ClickHouse') ORDER BY text;
SELECT ngramSimHashUTF8('Fuzzy Testing') AS FuzzyHash, ngramSimHashUTF8('Database Testing', 5) AS DBHash;
